header_note: This decision tree is derived from D:/sbc_consultx/wiki/synthesis/sprinkler-required-decision.md and converted to ordered steps. It is NOT legal source. Every verdict must be paired with a verbatim citation from the cited SBC 801 Section 903.2 sub-section.

ar: ما ارتفاع أرضية الطابق الأول عن سطح الأرض الطبيعية بالأمتار؟
هل يوجد طابق تحت سطح الأرض؟
كم عدد الطوابق فوق منسوب التسوية؟
ما حيز الحريق على كل طابق وإجمالي الحيز المجمع بالمتر المربع؟
في حال السكن R-2، كم عدد الوحدات؟
في حال M، ما مساحة عرض وبيع الأثاث المنجد بالمتر المربع؟
en: What is the occupancy group and sub-classification?
What is the first-story floor height above natural grade in metres?
How many stories above grade plane?
What is the fire area per floor and the combined fire area in square metres?
What is the total occupant load?
If R-2 residential, how many dwelling units?
If M, what is the upholstered-furniture display + sale area in square metres?

steps.title: High-rise trigger
steps.prompt: Is the building a high-rise per Section 202 / 903.2.11 (highest occupied floor located more than the high-rise threshold above the lowest level of fire-department access)?

steps.title: Underground / basement trigger
steps.prompt: Does the building include any below-grade story or underground building condition per Section 903.2.10?

steps.title: Group A (Assembly) triggers
steps.prompt: If the primary occupancy is Group A, evaluate Section 903.2.1: does any sub-class A-1..A-5 trigger meet (e.g. fire area threshold, occupant load, theatrical use)?

branches.answer: A-3 / A-4 / A-5 fire-area threshold exceeded per 903.2.1
Group A but no trigger met

steps.title: Group B / E triggers
steps.prompt: If Group B (Business) or E (Educational), apply Section 903.2.3 (Group E) triggers (fire area thresholds, story count); for Group B apply general 903.2 height/area triggers.

branches.answer: Group B story-count trigger met per 903.2

steps.title: Group F (Factory/Industrial) triggers
steps.prompt: If Group F, apply Section 903.2.4: F-1 fire area, story count, and combined area thresholds.

steps.title: Group H (High-Hazard) triggers
steps.prompt: If any Group H sub-class (H-1..H-5) is present, Section 903.2.5 makes sprinkler protection mandatory regardless of size; verify with 903.2.5 sub-paragraphs.

steps.title: Group I (Institutional) triggers
steps.prompt: If Group I, apply Section 903.2.6: I-1 (>16 occupants), I-2/I-3/I-4 always required.

steps.title: Group M (Mercantile) fire area trigger
steps.prompt: If Group M, is the Group M fire area on any single floor greater than 1115 m2, or located more than three stories above grade plane, or combined > 2230 m2 (Section 903.2.7)?

steps.title: Group M upholstered-furniture sub-clause 903.2.7.2
steps.prompt: If Group M displays and offers for sale upholstered furniture or mattresses with display + sale area > 465 m2 (Section 903.2.7.2)?

steps.title: Group R (Residential) triggers
steps.prompt: If Group R, apply Section 903.2.8: R-1 always required; R-2 if more than the dwelling-unit / story threshold per 903.2.8; R-3 single-family typically not required; R-4 evaluate per sub-clauses.

branches.answer: R-2 with > 4 dwelling units or > 3 stories per 903.2.8

steps.title: Group S (Storage) triggers
steps.prompt: If Group S, apply Section 903.2.9: S-1 always required when fire-area thresholds are exceeded; S-2 evaluate sub-clauses (parking garages have separate provisions).

steps.title: Render verdict and assumptions
steps.prompt: Aggregate the boolean sprinkler_required flag across all triggered steps. If true, cite the triggering Section verbatim. If false, list every checked Section and confirm none was triggered.

outputs.conditional_flag: true if any input was assumed
outputs.assumptions_list: every assumption listed in plain language
outputs.missing_info_restated: restate missing-info checklist alongside the verdict

steps.citation_requirement: Always cite the triggering 903.2 sub-section verbatim from SBC 801. Synthesis is not legal source.
